decision.note: Smoke-test only: final verdict requires Model A continuous_terrain_v1.jsonl. The round-2 artifact is too small and c1-clustered for the required gate.

limitations: Round-2 smoke-test data is not the expanded continuous terrain dataset.
Only the final A artifact may be used for the true representation verdict.
The old round-2 c1 class remains sparse and game-clustered.
Smoke mode reconstructs some features from replays; final A data is expected to be self-contained.
one_next_experiment: Run this same pipeline on Model A's expanded continuous_terrain_v1.jsonl once available.
